feature.name: side-relative syntax for background-position-x/y longhands
feature.creator: jfernandez@chromium.org
feature.summary:
Defines the background image's position relative to one of its edges. 

This syntax gives web authors a more flexible and responsive mechanisms to define the background image position, instead of using fixed values that need to be adapted to the window's or frame's size. 

This feature is applied also to the "-webkit-mask-position" to ensure webcompat levels are the same.

This feature is applied also to the "-webkit-mask-position" to ensure webcompat levels are the same. Category: CSS. Blink component: Blink>CSS. Stars: 72.

adoption.finding: The CSS property counter 'background-position' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 27) measured 74.0210% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2013-08-08 with 4409 data points. Mapping confidence: name-matched-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the background-position family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 144 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
